raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The investments made in this bill build on the lessons of the pandemic to ensure school communities can bounce back stronger from the challenges of the past year.",
    "Schools provide more than just education, as demonstrated during the pandemic.",
    "Working families depend on nutritional and after-school services to keep kids healthy, growing, and engaged.",
    "A child's mental and emotional needs are critical for their development.",
    "The budget bill includes $550 million for targeted learning recovery and emotional support programs for kids with special needs.",
    "$790 million is allocated to make Universal Transitional Kindergarten a reality by the 2025-2026 school year.",
    "$1.7 billion is designated to ensure critical after-school programs are accessible in all school districts for the 2021-22 school year.",
    "$64 million is allocated to provide two free meals a day to all students in grades TK-12, regardless of free and reduced lunch eligibility, starting with the 2021-22 school year."
  ]
}
```
